auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Recruit CRM API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Get it from Recruit CRM Admin Settings; the official authentication guide is https://docs.recruitcrm.io/docs/rcrm-api-reference/ZG9jOjExMDcyMQ-authentication.

actions.name: get_candidate
actions.description: Fetch one Recruit CRM candidate by slug or path identifier.

candidate.description: The Recruit CRM candidate slug or path identifier to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching a Recruit CRM candidate.

raw.description: The raw Recruit CRM API response.

outputSchema.description: A Recruit CRM candidate detail response.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Fetch one Recruit CRM company by slug or path identifier.

company.description: The Recruit CRM company slug or path identifier to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching a Recruit CRM company.

raw.description: The raw Recruit CRM API response.

outputSchema.description: A Recruit CRM company detail response.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Fetch one Recruit CRM contact by slug or path identifier.

contact.description: The Recruit CRM contact slug or path identifier to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching a Recruit CRM contact.

raw.description: The raw Recruit CRM API response.

outputSchema.description: A Recruit CRM contact detail response.

actions.name: get_job
actions.description: Fetch one Recruit CRM job by slug or path identifier.

job.description: The Recruit CRM job slug or path identifier to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching a Recruit CRM job.

raw.description: The raw Recruit CRM API response.

outputSchema.description: A Recruit CRM job detail response.

actions.name: list_candidates
actions.description: List candidates from Recruit CRM using the official Recruit CRM API with optional pagination.

page.description: One-based page number to request from Recruit CRM.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return from Recruit CRM.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Recruit CRM records.

candidates.description: Candidate records returned by Recruit CRM.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Recruit CRM, or null.

raw.description: The raw Recruit CRM API response.

outputSchema.description: A Recruit CRM candidate list response.

actions.name: list_companies
actions.description: List companies from Recruit CRM using the official Recruit CRM API with optional pagination.

page.description: One-based page number to request from Recruit CRM.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return from Recruit CRM.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Recruit CRM records.

companies.description: Company records returned by Recruit CRM.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Recruit CRM, or null.

raw.description: The raw Recruit CRM API response.

outputSchema.description: A Recruit CRM company list response.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Recruit CRM records.

contacts.description: Contact records returned by Recruit CRM.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Recruit CRM, or null.

raw.description: The raw Recruit CRM API response.

outputSchema.description: A Recruit CRM contact list response.

actions.description: List jobs from Recruit CRM using the official Recruit CRM API with optional pagination.

page.description: One-based page number to request from Recruit CRM.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return from Recruit CRM.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Recruit CRM records.

jobs.description: Job records returned by Recruit CRM.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Recruit CRM, or null.

raw.description: The raw Recruit CRM API response.
